examples.input:
Premises: Tyga is a rapper. Rappers release rap albums. Tyga released the Well Done 3 album. Rappers are not opera singers.
Conclusion: Well Done 3 is worth listening to.
examples.metadata_premises_text: Tyga is a rapper. Rappers release rap albums. Tyga released the Well Done 3 album. Rappers are not opera singers.
examples.metadata_conclusion: Well Done 3 is worth listening to.
